purpose: Canonical source for release governance, recursive rebuild control, manifest traceability and deployment readiness dashboards.

governance_metrics.interpretation: Generated artifacts should map back to canonical source inputs.
Every rendered dashboard should reference a canonical JSON/YAML/Markdown source.
Measures deployability, readability, navigation and governance maturity.
Higher values indicate generated content outpacing SSoT control.
Ability to deterministically reconstruct outputs from canonical sources.

control_principles: Generated outputs are never authoritative sources.
SSoT inputs should lead all dashboard generation.
Plot growth without proof growth is dilution.
Governance maturity should increase with engineering complexity.
